task: Go to the URL and complete the Svelte form by filling in all required fields and submitting. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/svelte-form.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully completed the task by navigating to the specified URL, identifying all required form fields, and filling them out correctly. It handled the file upload requirement by creating a dummy PNG file and attaching it to the form. The agent also correctly identified and resolved issues such as stale references and incorrect date formats. Finally, it submitted the form and validated the success message, providing a clear summary of its actions and the outcome.
